texto: To be the child of a conficted or reputed witch was inherently dangerous; in one pathetic case in Lorraine a young couple were both accused, and it emerged that they had decided to marry after attending an execution at the stake of their respective parents, 'so that they would have nothing to reproach one another with.
explicacao: Citação de Robin Briggs sobre temas ligados a amor. “To be the child of a conficted or reputed witch was inherently dangerous; in one pathetic case in…” articula amor, history, tragedy em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como casamento e dia-chuvoso.
